summary: This is a stub page that redirects readers to version 3.0 of Joel Spolsky's 'The Guerrilla Guide to Interviewing.' The original 2000 post has been superseded by an updated version. No substantive content remains on this page beyond the redirect link.
key_points: This is a redirect stub, not a full article
The content was important enough to warrant multiple revisions (at least 3 versions)
Originally published in March 2000, making it one of Joel's earliest influential pieces
key_insight: This stub page contains no analyzable content; the actual article exists at the linked version 3.0 URL.
